Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: reformatories (buildings) [300006483], correctional institutions (buildings) [300006448], institutional buildings [300132384], single built works by function [300004894], single built works by specific type [300004795], single built works (built environment) [300004790], Single Built Works (hierarchy name) [300004789], Built Environment (hierarchy name) [300264550], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Places of relatively short confinement for youthful offenders pending transfer or trial.
Lugar de confinamiento relativamente corto para delicuentes jóvenes pendientes de traslado o juicio.
Wordt gebruikt voor plaatsen voor betrekkelijk korte opsluiting van jeugdige overtreders in afwachting van overplaatsing of rechtszaak.
監禁待移轉或候審的青年罪犯的場所，其監禁時間較其他同類機構短。
Ort für eine Haft von geringer Dauer für jugendliche Straftäter vor der Verlegung in andere Einrichtungen oder vor der Gerichtsverhandlung.
Locais de confinamento relativamente curto para jovens infratores pendentes de transferência ou julgamento.

Source.Source_ID: 2000028641/Moyer et al., Planning and Design of Regional and Community Correctional Centers (1971)
2000028641/Moyer et al., Planning and Design of Regional and Community Correctional Centers (1971)

Non-Preferred_Term.Term_Text: ch'ing shao nien lin shih chü liu so
qīng shào nián lín shí jū liú suǒ
qing shao nian lin shi ju liu suo

Source.Source_ID: 2000095879/Walpusky, Vom Versagen in der Berliner Schulpolitik (2014)
